candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label on the income statement; best direct match for total revenue/sales.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line as the priority revenue label.
No cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present. This appears to be a bank income statement, so COGS is not reported as a separate concept.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket and valid SG&A-type component; not a total row.
Explicit SG&A row and populated; per rule hierarchy, prefer this single explicit SG&A row when present.
Administrative overhead component, but likely a subcomponent of broader SG&A.
Operating expense but unusual/non-recurring and not a core SG&A bucket.
Not an expense row and not from the income statement; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only 'Selling General & Administrative Expenses' per the hierarchy. Excluded other components/subcomponents and non-core items to avoid double counting.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present on the income statement.

candidates.why: Direct, explicit interest expense line; best match and suitable as the primary priority label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific subcomponent of interest expense, not preferred over the aggregate interest expense line.
Residual subcomponent of interest expense, not preferred over the aggregate line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure, not preferred over the main interest expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the main reported interest expense line; excluded subcomponents/supplemental rows because XINT should use a single reported line item.

candidates.why: Direct equity attributable to shareholders; preferred over Total Equity because it avoids potential double counting with non-controlling interests.
Valid equity line, but less preferred because non-controlling interests are reported separately.
Balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible. Included 'Total Equity' as a fallback priority label in case reporting changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interests line; preferred match for MIB.
Alternative balance-sheet label for minority interest; valid fallback.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred when balance-sheet NCI lines exist.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not a balance-sheet minority interest balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest balance; not suitable.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet NCI labels as priority choices for minority interest. These appear separate from shareholders' equity, so using them with BE avoids double counting.
